/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -fPIC -g CMakeFiles/run_interface.dir/source/run_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_interface.dir/source/user/custom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_interface.dir/source/user/rl_controller.cpp.o -o ../bin/run_interface   -L/home/jetson/RoboTamerSdk4Qmini/thirdparty/lib/aarch64  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/home/jetson/RoboTamerSdk4Qmini/lib/m8010motor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jetson/RoboTamerSdk4Qmini/thirdparty/lib/aarch64:/usr/local/lib:/home/jetson/RoboTamerSdk4Qmini/lib/m8010motor ../lib/aarch64/libunitree_sdk2.a -lddscxx -lrt -lpthread -lonnxruntime /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -lUnitreeMotorSDK_Arm64 -lddsc /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5
